paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 186 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 98 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 42 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 39 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **73 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 44 days past due with 34 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **27 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $29,627 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 32 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **36 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $21,468 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 32 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $18,450 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 16 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **42 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $11,631 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $13,198 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $34,402 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

293 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **265 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 28 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$80,036 in payments going out this week** across 47 tasks — make sure funds are available. $64,764 expected in from 10 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 5. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 16 overdue (oldest: 15d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **42 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 49 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 2. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 34 overdue (oldest: 44d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **27 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 31 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 32 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **36 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 36 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 2 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 14. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 39 overdue (oldest: 15d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **73 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 73 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 20 overdue (oldest: 32d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 10 overdue (oldest: 16d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **21 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
